name: smart-audit-interview
description: AI-Enriched Continuous Audit Pipeline — prototype Audit SaaS platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix worker && npm install --prefix migrations
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend,worker -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix worker"
scripts.clean: npx --yes rimraf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules migrations/node_modules worker/node_modules
